calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Wayne Snodgrass, 415-554-4675 for Respondent/Moving party Residential rent Stabliization and Arbitration.
Jennifer Su, 415-277-7200 for Petitioner/Opposing party Adora Lim.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: RESPONDENT RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is sustained without leave to amend. Petition fails to name necessary and indispensable party and any future joinder is barred by the 90-day limitation. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
